summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PosterSmith AI - Backend APIs working well (92.3% success), Frontend authentication and core UI working, identified email validation issue and admin role assignment concern

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - both indicate access denied, just different specificity

validation_issues.issue: Email validation rejects .test domains but accepts .com domains

ui_bugs.issue: Admin link not visible in navigation even for admin users

integration_issues.issue: Need to verify if first registered user actually gets admin role

passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct sections and navigation
User registration with proper email domains (@example.com)
Workspace form elements (prompt input, style selector, generate button)
Dashboard navigation and empty state display
Protected route access control (redirects unauthenticated users)
Backend health check and API root endpoints
Backend user registration API (creates users with correct roles)
Backend login API with JWT token generation
Backend poster generation API (successfully creates posters)
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Fix email validation to accept broader range of email domains (.test domains should be valid for testing). 2) Investigate admin role assignment - verify first registered user gets admin role and admin navigation link appears. 3) Consider changing 403 to 401 for unauthenticated requests for better REST compliance.
